ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violent_crimes" (
  "violent_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violent crime record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the crime occurred */,
  "murder" INTEGER /* Number of murders reported */,
  "forcible_rape" INTEGER /* Number of forcible rapes reported */,
  "robbery" INTEGER /* Number of robberies reported */,
  "aggravated_assault" INTEGER /* Number of aggravated assaults reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violent_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violent_crimes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_crimes" (
  "property_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property crime record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the crime occurred */,
  "burglary" INTEGER /* Number of burglaries reported */,
  "larceny_theft" INTEGER /* Number of larceny-thefts reported */,
  "motor_vehicle_theft" INTEGER /* Number of motor vehicle thefts reported */,
  "arson" INTEGER /* Number of arsons reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_crimes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistics record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which statistics are recorded */,
  "total_violent" INTEGER /* Total number of violent crimes */,
  "total_property" INTEGER /* Total number of property crimes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Murder, Burglary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subtype of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_types_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("subtype_id") REFERENCES crime_subtypes ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the severity rank of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime incident occurred */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES crime_ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime report */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the police officer assigned to the case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the incident */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_logs_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the police officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which resources are allocated */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., Community Policing Program) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the resource */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was allocated */,
  "allocation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource allocation ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_resources_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
